quests.name: The Frozen People
quests.description: Stalgard lies under eternal frost. Cull the beasts and claim a Jotun's heart.

objectives.description: Collect a Jotun Heart from a Jotun Warden

dialogueStart: Stalgard froze in a single night, they say. Its people never woke.
The Jotun Wardens keep the cold. Take one's heart — I can read the frost's origin in it.
dialogueCompletion: The heart still beats cold in my hands. This frost is no accident — it was summoned.
There is a beacon that anchors it. Hold there while I unravel the binding.

quests.name: The Frozen Beacon
quests.description: Survive at the frozen beacon while Amuun unbinds the frost.

objectives.description: Survive 45 seconds at the Frozen Beacon (stay inside)

dialogueStart: Stand in the beacon's light. The cold will hurl its beasts at you without pause.
Forty-five heartbeats. Do not step out, or the binding snaps back.
dialogueCompletion: The beacon breaks. Warmth returns to Stalgard's air, if not yet its people.
One last hall remains sealed — and something in it does not want the thaw.

quests.name: The Last Hall
quests.description: Hold the last hall against the frost's final fury.

objectives.description: Repel 4 waves at the Last Hall

dialogueStart: The last hall holds the hearth-stone. Break the seal and the frost dies — but the Jotun will come.
Four assaults. Hold, and Stalgard is free.
dialogueCompletion: The hearth burns again. Stalgard will remember your name.
South and east now — to the jungles of Nahuatlan, where an older worship still draws blood.
